title: Infosys receives penalty order for alleged non-realization of export proceeds
detailed_summary: Infosys received communication from the Assistant Commissioner of Central tax for collection of a penalty totaling INR 1,13,59,395/-. The matter relates to alleged non-realization of export proceeds on account of write off of invoices for FY 2018-19 to 2022-23. Infosys stated there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

key_facts.fact: The Assistant Commissioner of Central tax passed orders/action for a total penalty of INR 1,13,59,395/-.
The demand was issued for alleged non-realization of export proceeds on account of write off of invoices for FY 2018-19 to 2022-23.
Infosys stated there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.

litigation_or_regulatory_matters.description: Penalty order/action for alleged non-realization of export proceeds on account of write off of invoices for FY 2018-19 to 2022-23.

important_text_spans.text: None, there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.

processing_notes: Marked non-material because the document reports a relatively limited regulatory penalty and explicitly states no material impact on Infosys financials, operations, or other activities.
